name: SF car-count / density data (PeMS + AADT + LODES)
role: Estimate 'how many cars on the road in area Y at time Z' to seed the number of agents and their spatial density in the sim.
decision: Primary: Caltrans PeMS (real 5-min freeway counts, free account — register a few days early). Pair with Caltrans AADT x an hourly K-factor curve for a per-hour baseline that needs no live feed. Use LODES/SFMTA to shape surface-street direction/volume. Be explicit in the demo that counts are modeled/aggregate, not live per-street.

options.name: Caltrans PeMS
options.what: real vehicle flow/counts/speed at 5-min per detector, Bay Area = District 4 (I-80/US-101/I-280)
options.access: free account, 1-2 day approval, UI export (no clean public API)

options.name: Caltrans AADT
options.what: annual avg daily traffic on state highways

options.name: US Census LODES / OnTheMap
options.what: home->work commute O-D flows (workers, not vehicles)

alternatives_rejected: Uber Movement — DEFUNCT (shut down 2023), archives only
risks: No public feed gives per-street live counts — set demo expectations accordingly
PeMS needs an account approved BEFORE the event
PeMS is freeway-only; surface streets must be inferred
effort: hours (+ lead time for PeMS account)
